review_title: good soultion
author: Taieb G.
pros: all the services provided are clear and easy to use. It is an excellent software
cons: evry thing is good the software is complet

review_title: A very good cloud hosting provider
description: I have used OVH/OVHcloud for more than 10 years, where I have multiple servers, use their registrar, DNS, email and file hosting services. I am very satisfied with those, their reliability is very good and I consider it as one of the best hosts currently.
author: Michel B.
pros: OVHcloud is a very decent host with lots of services at decent prices. After using it for more than 10 years, I rarely encountered any issue, and the rare ones were fixed quickly by their 24/7 support team. They often are ahead of the curve in innovation, and offer compatibility with competitor APIs.
cons: They have had some questionable practices in the past, such as offering a "backup" service which was found out to be physically in the same building as the servers backed up when one of their datacenters burnt down. They once forced me to move a physical server to another datacenter, making me pay more of I didn't do it.

review_title: They sometime shut down my servers for nothing
description: Servers work always fine but they have shut down my server despite several email to warn them the server was not hacked and was perfectly fine
author: Laurent B.
pros: Servers have good prices There is many servers configurations to choose from
cons: No choice of GPU servers They sometime shut down my servers for nothing ( Wrong detection of hacking )

review_title: Good, I’m satisfied compared to the price paid
description: I have been quite pleased with OVH. Might not be 101% up and reliable (but none of this kind of service is bulletproof!) and the user dashboard, while for the 90% easy and modern, could be even more streamlined and intuitive. But hey it works, prices seemed good (there are often temporary sales) and clear with no hidden surprises (at least until now), and it does what I need without issues. Each use case might be different, but for simple setups like mine there’s not much to complain about.
author: Davide B.
pros: The dashboard and services activation is easy and smooth to operate. Deployment times range from good to acceptable. Prices are competitive for my use case and you can subscribe for all the services you may need within OVH and manage them all together (VPS, domain names, email hosting with exchange, cloud security, and much more). I found to be very useful the option to delegate access to the dashboard to other users to allow for maintenance or collaborating.
cons: Some parts of the dashboard are confusing and it might be difficult to find the options you were looking for, or miss them entirely. But for the most part is nice and smooth and with helpful hints. Some little downtime here and there but mostly minimal, and compared to the price paid I can’t complain! Customer Care unfortunately has been a little slow to respond, and not much helpful. Luckily the issues were not much impacting and solved themselves somehow.

review_title: Good player but bad support
description: OVH offer us to manage dedicaced server, vrtual server easely but to be honest, OVH it's not the best : you pay low so network issue can come...
author: Nicolas P.
pros: OVH is a very good hosting company with little price from several years. They have regular update on their offer that helping administrator to build good network solution
cons: Unfortunally, OVH have growth to fast and lost the "nerd" aspect of them : if you are not a big customers, you will have so bad support (waity for days for easy answer...). They have regular new product but they delete other solution with small window to prepare small company to manage with that.

review_title: The greatest host
author: Zoltan S.
pros: Reliable, fast hosting, easy to get rolling and extremely helpful support. The best hosting provider in my opinon.
cons: Albeit minor, we've had a few cases of tiny downtime this year which affected our business.

review_title: OVHcloud, a great platform for your developments in the cloud
description: We have been working with OVH since 2011. In general, we are very happy. In these years we have had very few incidents.To be honest, we were one of the many clients affected by the huge fire that ovh suffered in one of its data centers. But, we have continued to trust this provider. And we are convinced that this fact will have served to reinforce all security measures.
author: Rafael M.
pros: What I like the most is the ease of use of the platform. As with other providers, you can create and control your VPS, but at OVHCloud we have functions that I don't find with other providers, or at least not so easily.For example, the server can be easily expanded without having to stop and notify the provider.You can also contract a daily automated backup. I can't find that option in other providers with an affordable price.
cons: In the software platform, in our day to day I find nothing missing. Most necessities are conveniently located. Customer service could be improved. Especially in terms of specialists in Plesk and Linux in general. Many times, we need a closer support at an affordable cost. I know that ovh is working in this area, but in my experience I have missed it. Other providers have technicians who try to help you (on issues like spam, email, etc.)

review_title: You get what you pay for
description: It's all fine as long as everything works. Only two case scenarios work fine at OVH : - You have a non critical app/website (unlikely if you're doing "real" business) - You have a critical app but master the full tech stack yourself and just leave them the hardware to handle. If you need blazing fast support to manage and troubleshoot your servers, you'd better look at someplace else.
author: Geoffrey J.
pros: It's a cheap host for the performance you get. Ideal for a development environment. But that's about all there is when you go with them.
cons: The support is slow (we're talking days where you'd need hours at worst), tickets get lost. Your last chance is often your first... call the phone hotline and pray to not have to wait in vain (they don't even have a chat support). Their proprietary admin console is confusing as it often changes and is not consistent among their offers. If you're not a system admin able to pinpoint your issue and make support job easier, get ready for a very frustrating customer experience when things go south.

review_title: Cloud computing based in EU
description: Overall, I would recommend OVH Cloud as a solid choice for businesses looking for reliable and affordable hosting services hosted and owned by a European company.
author: Isak P.
pros: OVHcloud is a cloud computing company based in the European Union. This is an important factor for us since some of our customers prefer to have their data stored within the EU due to data privacy regulations. Customer support has been responsive whenever we have needed assistance.
cons: One area where I have had some issues with OVH Cloud is downtime. I have had a few instances where my application was unavailable for short periods and where not notified about this.

review_title: Great prices and integrations with other web services in one account
description: I was really satisfied for having a good hosting service with OVH because my domains are also there. But the difficulty of managing it, made me switch to a semi managed VPS.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It offers a relatively cheap price for cloud VPS, but at the same time it is powerful. A great plus is that with one OVH account you can have other services like domain managements, DNS servers, Emails accounts, Email marketing, cloud software, etc.
cons: Since I'm not a server expert it seemed hard to implement and maintain properly an infrastructure in a non managed VPS
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Un servizio hosting professionale
description: La nostra azienda lo usa per ospitare i siti web da moltissimi anni e, a parte un paio di blocchi, il servizio ha sempre funzionato bene. Ottimo e veloce il supporto tecnico. Abbiamo diversi servizi di hosting ma OVH ha un ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: OVHCloud offre un servizio a pagamento di hosting professionale per vari siti web e offre all'utente la possibilità gestire qualsiasi attività in modo semplice e di avere svariati rapporti utili per i clienti. Offre, inoltre, al cliente un ottimo sistema di supporto tecnico multilingua e risulta sicuro contro i vari attacchi informatici.
cons: Non abbiamo rilevato nulla di negativo sul servizio. Lo usiamo da moltissimi anni e, a memoria, si è bloccato un paio di volte.
author_profession: Senior Front-End Developer - Web Designer & UI Developer

review_title: OVH è una garanzia ma non eccelle in nulla
description: Esperienza stabile, senza infamia nè lode. Ci sono players italiani nettamente migliori per il nostro mercato.
author: Michelangelo C.
pros: I servizi OVH sono, oggettivamente, una garanzia: un'azienda solida, europea, 100% in linea con la GDPR e con prezzi competitivi sul mercato. Oltre questo offre una gamma di prodotti talmente ampia da rendere inutile l'andare a cercare altre soluzioni in giro. Sono davvero rari i casi spiacevoli con questa azienda.
cons: Come nel titolo non eccelle in nulla. L'assistenza clienti, a meno che non si paghino piani di assistenza, è mediocre, la gestione dei record DNS non è rapida, i VPS hanno prestazioni standard e la sicurezza delle server farm, visti i fatti di cronaca, sembra essere quasi trascurata. Al momento utilizzo i servizi OVH solamente per la gestione domini.

review_title: Una buen opcion para alojar tu web en unos servidores de calidad
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Lo que mas me gusta es la gran variedad de servidores que tienes a un precio muy competitivo, llevamos varios años trabajando con OVH y la relacion calidad precio es muy buena. No hemos tenido ningun problema.
cons: No hay nada que me disguste, todo ha sido muy trasparente con lo contratado
author_profession: Responsable de Marketing Online y Ecommerce

review_title: Buon servizio di Hosting
author: Alessio L.
pros: Utilizzo OVH per hostare i miei siti web, devo dire che mi ci trovo molto bene, una cosa molto positiva di OVH è il loro prezzo davvero buono rispetto alla concorrenza
cons: Per il momento non ho problemi sui siti web che sono hostati con ovh, unica pecca delle volte vanno down i server ma in breve tempo riescono ad aggiustare il problema

review_title: Good provider with good support and bad web panel
description: The core which is the VPS are really good, but the web panel tears all the joy. Thankfully the Customer Support is very good in every channel (chat, messages, calls).
author: Piotr P.
pros: Stable and solid VPS solution, once set up it runs like a perpetuum mobile. Scalable to a certain point with just a few click to server upgrade.
cons: Web panel. Buggy and with bad UX, you need to be patient if you plan to do something there.

review_title: OVH es una mierda
author: Nehmen F.
pros: precios bajos no tienen nada que pueda ser destacable mierda de soporte tecnico
cons: una mierda de soporte tecnico mal servicio tecnico

review_title: Good & Cheaper Solution
description: it is a good solution, when you want to test something or you don't want to work locally
author: Mario P.
pros: they provide a good assistance with the settings of the server, installations in my case i always use it, for my test sites, for development projects.
cons: they are always under attack, 3 years ago i lost all my data.

review_title: Quality review of OVHcloud
author: Rahul D.
pros: - It's really easy in terms of handling- Qualitative hardware & network
cons: - Might face issue of technical support as It's bit slow

review_title: A super fast and secure servers
author: Eitan T.
pros: The servers are really fast, the DDoS protection is one of the best i have seen.
cons: The VPS's bandwidth is limited to 2 Gbit/s

review_title: Mediocre para una empresa como OVH
author: María H.
pros: Tiene una promoción de 200$ gratis por lo que estamos pensando en hacer un cloud privado para la seguridad en la empresa, que actualmente tenemos subcontratado, cuando funciona, funciona bien, aunque hemos tenido un par de caídas medio importantes.
cons: El data center no se escoge en el proceso, sino que te lo asigna automáticamente y a veces falla, el problema viene en que si necesitas ayuda en OVH pueden pasar días y las soluciones son demasiado genéricas, por lo que necesitas insistir.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Una opcion muy completa de servicios en la nube
description: Mi experiencia en OVH cloud es buena. Aún conservo algunos servicios ahí y trabajan muy bien.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Lo que más me gusta de OVH Cloud es que tengo muchos servicios en un solo lugar como servidores, dominios y correo electrónico
cons: En general el servicio es bueno y no falla. Pero cuando he tenido problemas con mi cuenta, el equipo de soporte ha tardado un poco en contestar.

review_title: This platform has powerful security features.
author: Stephanie L.
pros: I have been using cloud services on other platforms before OVH , two things set OVH apart: the security feature and his customer support .
cons: OVH is among the expensive platforms in the market

review_title: Hébergeur de qualité supérieure
description: J'ai aimé et je le recommande
author: Basile D.
pros: J'ai apprécié les plans tarifaire de cet hébergeur et le niveau de sécurité est au top
cons: Le seul défaut c'est qu'y a pas de moyen de paiement mobile money pour nous qui sommes en Afrique
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: hébergeur OVH
author: justine B.
pros: j'utilise OVH comme hébergeur pour mon site internet. cela me permet de stocker mes fichiers pour le site. j'ai acheter mon nom de domaine et cela est renouvelable tous les ans.
cons: la plateforme est compliqué d'accès. je trouve qu'il y a beaucoup d'information. Il faut être former pour y naviguer correctement.

review_title: Servidor dedicado ovhcloud
description: Usaba los servicios de servidor dedicado y todo funcionaba bien cuando necesitas ayuda del servicio tecnico a veces costaba contactar con ellos.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: La API me parece que es intuitiva y me resultaba fácil utilizarla aunque se necesitan conocimiento de gestión de servidores
cons: El servicio tecnico no destaca nada en absoluto pudiendo ser en ocasiones inútil.
